VIP brand color (Archtics only), ex:  “#003399”
unique Ticket identifier, used to tell tickets apart internally, ex: “host-ticket/PHI/3-25412/1642438049000/ETMTEST1/0x0F000056”
Seat upgrade exchange status, AVAILABLE or NOT AVAILABLE

Ticket Delivery information (usually includes barcode and Passbook info)
resale ticket posting states
purchase date, formatted: yyyy-MM-dd’T’HH:mm:ss.SSSZ, ex: “2022-01-17T16:47:29.000Z”

UK: Delivery Type being used for Delivery.type, ex: “mail”,“pdf”,“ups”, “MOBILE”

legal Terms and Conditions (a long string),  ex: “This ticket is a revocable license…”

order source, used by Live Chat (UK), ex: UNSPECIFIED
used for All Tickets Fetch, ex: “cop-hostorder-4937319217”, “7664”
